sentences.target: Meine Schwester ist Architektin in Köln.

translations.de: Meine Schwester ist Architektin in Köln.
translations.en: My sister is an architect in Cologne.
translations.es: Mi hermana es arquitecta en Colonia.
translations.fr: Ma sœur est architecte à Cologne.
translations.it: Mia sorella è architetta a Colonia.
translations.zh-Hans: 我姐姐是科隆的建筑师。
translations.yue: 我家姐喺科隆做建築師。
translations.pt: Minha irmã é arquiteta em Colônia.
translations.vi: Chị tôi là kiến trúc sư ở Cologne.
translations.nl: Mijn zus is architect in Keulen.
translations.hi: मेरी बहन कोलोन में वास्तुकार है.
translations.pl: Moja siostra jest architektką w Kolonii.
translations.el: Η αδερφή μου είναι αρχιτεκτόνισσα στην Κολωνία.
translations.nb: Søsteren min er arkitekt i Köln.
translations.id: Saudara perempuan saya adalah arsitek di Köln.
translations.sv: Min syster är arkitekt i Köln.
translations.ro: Sora mea este arhitectă în Köln.
translations.cs: Moje sestra je architektka v Kolíně nad Rýnem.
translations.da: Min søster er arkitekt i Köln.
translations.ja: 私の姉はケルンで建築家です。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner modifying 'Schwester'; feminine nominative singular; 1st person singular possessor.
Common noun; feminine singular; subject of the clause.
Copular auxiliary; 3rd person singular present; links subject to predicate nominal.
Common noun; feminine singular; predicate nominal (profession).
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase.
Proper noun (city name); object of the preposition 'in'; location.

sentences.target: Ich habe die Architektin schon oft gesehen.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈhaːbə diː aʁçiˈtɛktɪn ʃoːn ɔft ɡəˈzeːən/

translations.de: Ich habe die Architektin schon oft gesehen.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈhaːbə diː aʁçiˈtɛktɪn ʃoːn ɔft ɡəˈzeːən/
translations.en: I have seen the architect many times already.
translations.es: Ya he visto a la arquitecta muchas veces.
translations.fr: J'ai déjà vu l'architecte plusieurs fois.
translations.it: Ho già visto l'architetta molte volte.
translations.ko: 그 건축가를 벌써 여러 번 봤어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我已经见过这位女建筑师很多次了。
translations.yue: 我已經見過嗰位女建築師好多次。
translations.ru: Я уже много раз видел этого архитектора.
translations.pt: Já vi a arquiteta muitas vezes.
translations.he: כבר ראיתי את האדריכלית הרבה פעמים.
translations.vi: Tôi đã gặp nữ kiến trúc sư đó nhiều lần rồi.
translations.ar: لقد رأيت المهندسة المعمارية مرات كثيرة.
translations.nl: Ik heb de architect al vaak gezien.
translations.uk: Я вже багато разів бачив цю архітекторку.
translations.hi: मैं उस महिला वास्तुकार को कई बार देख चुका हूँ.
translations.pl: Widziałem tę architektkę już wiele razy.
translations.el: Έχω ήδη δει την αρχιτεκτόνισσα πολλές φορές.
translations.nb: Jeg har allerede sett arkitekten mange ganger.
translations.id: Saya sudah sering melihat arsitek itu.
translations.sv: Jag har redan sett arkitekten många gånger.
translations.ro: Am văzut-o pe arhitectă de multe ori deja.
translations.cs: Tu architektku jsem už mnohokrát viděl.
translations.da: Jeg har allerede set arkitekten mange gange.
translations.fi: Olen jo nähnyt arkkitehdin monta kertaa.
translations.ja: その建築家はもう何度も見ました。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular nominative; subject.
Auxiliary forming the present perfect; 1st person singular present.
Definite article; feminine singular accusative; determiner for 'Architektin' (direct object).
Common noun; feminine singular; direct object (accusative).
Adverb expressing temporal aspect ('already').
Adverb of frequency.
Main verb in past participle (Partizip II); forms the perfect together with 'haben'.

sentences.target: Die Architektin plant unser neues Wohnzimmer.

translations.de: Die Architektin plant unser neues Wohnzimmer.
translations.en: The architect is planning our new living room.
translations.es: La arquitecta está diseñando nuestra sala de estar.
translations.it: L'architetta sta progettando il nostro nuovo soggiorno.
translations.ko: 그 건축가가 우리 새 거실을 설계하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 这位女建筑师正在设计我们的新客厅。
translations.yue: 嗰位女建築師正為我哋設計新客廳。
translations.pt: A arquiteta está planejando nossa nova sala de estar.
translations.he: האדריכלית מתכננת את הסלון החדש שלנו.
translations.vi: Nữ kiến trúc sư đang thiết kế phòng khách mới của chúng tôi.
translations.ar: المهندسة المعمارية تخطط لغرفة المعيشة الجديدة لدينا.
translations.nl: De architect ontwerpt onze nieuwe woonkamer.
translations.hu: Az építésznő az új nappalinkat tervezi.
translations.hi: वह वास्तुकार हमारी नई बैठक की योजना बना रही है.
translations.el: Η αρχιτεκτόνισσα σχεδιάζει το καινούργιο μας σαλόνι.
translations.id: Arsitek itu sedang merencanakan ruang tamu baru kami.
translations.ja: その建築家は私たちの新しいリビングを計画しています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; feminine singular nominative; determiner for 'Architektin'.
Common noun; feminine singular; subject.
Main verb; 3rd person singular present; transitive.
Possessive determiner; 1st person plural; modifies 'Wohnzimmer'.
Attributive adjective; nominative/accusative neuter singular with mixed inflection (-es) after a possessive determiner; modifies 'Wohnzimmer'.
Common noun; neuter singular; direct object of 'plant'.

translations.en: Our neighbor works as an architect.
translations.it: La nostra vicina lavora come architetta.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们的女邻居是一名建筑师。
translations.yue: 我哋嘅女鄰居係建築師。
translations.vi: Người hàng xóm của chúng tôi làm kiến trúc sư.
translations.hi: हमारी पड़ोसन वास्तुकार के रूप में काम करती है.
translations.el: Η γειτόνισσά μας εργάζεται ως αρχιτεκτόνισσα.
translations.ja: うちの近所の人は建築家として働いています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; feminine singular nominative; modifies 'Nachbarin'.
Common noun; feminine singular; subject.
Main verb; 3rd person singular present; intransitive.
Preposition meaning 'as'; introduces a role/occupation complement.
Common noun; feminine singular; complement of 'als' indicating role/profession.
